synopsis: "The Clone Wars: Cold Snap" is a six-page webcomic in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars webcomic series, posted on StarWars.com on January 29, 2009. "Cold Snap" leads directly into "Trespass," an episode in the Star Wars: The Clone Wars television series. The comic was written by Pablo Hidalgo, illustrated and colored by Jeffery Carlisle, and lettered by Grant Gould. It tells the story of a clone cold assault trooper nicknamed "Shiv" writing a letter to a fellow trooper, Flanker, telling him about the problems he is facing while stationed at Glid Station on the ice planet of Orto Plutonia, includi
title: The Clone Wars: Cold Snap
